requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 240 V / 50 Hz, Type I (Australian) Plug
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——240V/50Hz，I型（澳大利亚式）插头
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——240V/50Hz，I型（澳大利亞式）插頭

summary.en: Kiribati operates on 240 V / 50 Hz mains electricity and uses the Type I (Australian/New Zealand AS/NZS 3112) three-pin plug. Devices with mains connections must be compatible with this voltage and plug standard. AS/NZS 62368-1 (audio/video and IT equipment) and related AS/NZS electrical safety standards are the applicable reference framework. Chinese CCC electrical safety approval is not recognised. Test reports from accredited laboratories referencing AS/NZS or IEC equivalent electrical safety standards are accepted as supporting documentation.
summary.zh: 基里巴斯市电为240V/50Hz，使用I型（澳大利亚/新西兰AS/NZS 3112）三脚插头。带有市电连接的设备须兼容该电压和插头标准。AS/NZS 62368-1（音视频及信息技术设备）及相关AS/NZS电气安全标准为适用参考框架。中国CCC电气安全认证不被认可。认可实验室参照AS/NZS或IEC等效电气安全标准出具的测试报告可作为支持文件。
summary.zht: 吉里巴斯市電為240V/50Hz，使用I型（澳大利亞/新西蘭AS/NZS 3112）三腳插頭。帶有市電連接的設備須兼容該電壓和插頭標準。AS/NZS 62368-1（音視頻及信息技術設備）及相關AS/NZS電氣安全標準為適用參考框架。中國CCC電氣安全認證不被認可。認可實驗室參照AS/NZS或IEC等效電氣安全標準出具的測試報告可作為支持文件。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS 3112 (Approval and test specification — plugs and socket-outlets)
AS/NZS 62368-1 (Audio/video, IT and communications technology equipment — safety)
Kiribati electricity supply and building regulations (240 V / 50 Hz)

summary.en: Chinese electrical products must obtain CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covering GB electrical safety standards. Chinese mains supply is 220 V / 50 Hz with Type A/C/I plugs (GB 2099 series). CCC electrical safety approval and 220 V product specifications are not compatible with Kiribati's 240 V / Type I requirements.
summary.zh: 中国电气产品须取得涵盖GB电气安全标准的CCC（中国强制认证）。中国市电为220V/50Hz，使用A/C/I型插头（GB 2099系列）。CCC电气安全认证及220V产品规格与基里巴斯240V/I型要求不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國電氣產品須取得涵蓋GB電氣安全標準的CCC（中國強制認證）。中國市電為220V/50Hz，使用A/C/I型插頭（GB 2099系列）。CCC電氣安全認證及220V產品規格與吉里巴斯240V/I型要求不兼容。

standards_or_laws: GB 8898 (Audio, video and similar equipment safety — China)
GB 2099 series (plug and socket standards — China)
CCC mandatory certification (中国强制认证)

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety certification and 220 V product specifications are not recognised in Kiribati. Products must be rated or certified for 240 V / 50 Hz operation. Type I (AS/NZS 3112) plug must be fitted or supplied with an appropriate adapter. AS/NZS or IEC equivalent electrical safety test reports from accredited laboratories are required as MICT type approval supporting documentation. Dual-voltage (100–240 V) designs reduce re-certification burden.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电气安全认证及220V产品规格在基里巴斯不被认可。产品须额定或认证适用于240V/50Hz运行。须配置I型（AS/NZS 3112）插头或附带适配器。需提供认可实验室出具的AS/NZS或IEC等效电气安全测试报告作为MICT型号认证支持文件。双电压（100-240V）设计可降低重新认证的负担。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電氣安全認證及220V產品規格在吉里巴斯不被認可。產品須額定或認證適用於240V/50Hz運行。須配置I型（AS/NZS 3112）插頭或附帶適配器。需提供認可實驗室出具的AS/NZS或IEC等效電氣安全測試報告作為MICT型號認證支持文件。雙電壓（100-240V）設計可降低重新認證的負擔。

source.publisher: Ministry of Information, Communication and Transport, Kiribati

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese CCC is not recognised in Kiribati. Products must be rated for 240 V / 50 Hz and fitted with Type I (AS/NZS 3112) plugs. AS/NZS or IEC equivalent electrical safety test reports from an accredited laboratory are required. Dual-voltage designs are recommended to simplify compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国CCC在基里巴斯不被认可。产品须额定适用于240V/50Hz并配置I型（AS/NZS 3112）插头。需提供认可实验室出具的AS/NZS或IEC等效电气安全测试报告。建议采用双电压设计以简化合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國CCC在吉里巴斯不被認可。產品須額定適用於240V/50Hz並配置I型（AS/NZS 3112）插頭。需提供認可實驗室出具的AS/NZS或IEC等效電氣安全測試報告。建議採用雙電壓設計以簡化合規。
